babi_qa.description: Official bAbI QA tasks, 20 proxy story-based QA tasks; minimum required tasks for HTCE Stage 11 are 1, 15, 16.
babi_qa.license: CC BY 3.0 / dataset card license; verify at download time

dialog_babi.description: Original Dialog bAbI restaurant-domain dialog tasks 1..6.
dialog_babi.license: verify dataset card/source at download time

modified_babi_dialog.description: IBM modified bAbI dialog tasks for unseen user behavior stress testing.
modified_babi_dialog.license: verify repository license before commercial redistribution

permuted_babi_dialog.description: IBM permuted bAbI dialog tasks for multiple valid responses / response variation.
permuted_babi_dialog.license: verify repository license before commercial redistribution

noisy_real_dialogue.description: License-safe HTCE-curated semi-real noisy dialogue mini-corpus for contradiction, coreference, mixed EN/RU and clarification behavior.
